sub_modules.fp_fir_sample_packer: Combinationally packs the top module sample-history registers into a flat tap bus.
sub_modules.fp_highpass_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient ROM exposing the exact 101 binary32 high-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fp_fir_real_mac: Combinational FIR multiply-accumulate model that converts IEEE-754 binary32 words to real values, evaluates the tap sum, and returns a rounded binary32 output.
